description:
## Deep Component Audit ‚Äî hx-ripple

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-ripple/`

### wc-mcp Tools ‚Äî USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `get_design_tokens`, `find_components_using_token`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** ‚Äî `--hx-` tokens. Ripple color, opacity, duration. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** ‚Äî WCAG 2.1 AA. Reduced-motion support (prefers-reduced-motion). Decorative only.
3. **Functionality** ‚Äî Click ripple effect. Touch support. Programmatic trigger. Unbounded mode. Integration with buttons/cards.
4. **TypeScript** ‚Äî Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** ‚Äî Shadow DOM. Animation performance (transform/opacity only). Containment. CSS Parts.
6. **CEM Accuracy** ‚Äî All API documented.
7. **Tests** ‚Äî 80%+ coverage. Click trigger. Touch. Animation. Reduced-motion.
8. **Storybook** ‚Äî On button. On card. Unbounded. Custom color.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** ‚Äî Utility component. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** ‚Äî CDN-ready. Performance-critical utility.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-ripple
